message:
feat(tui): add panic-safe terminal guard and harden lifecycle (bd-xzt.2.8)

Add TerminalGuard RAII type that manages raw mode, alternate screen,
and a custom panic hook. Terminal state is restored on Drop even during
panics via an atomic flag and best-effort cleanup. Wire guard into the
new cockpit runtime path. Also add PartialEq derives to DaemonState
types for adapter compatibility, handle expanded model variants in
update/render, and integrate navigation/overlay/notification support
contributed by concurrent agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
